name: BT Catalog
changelog: Fix sale detection using verified live S&S data: during a special, S&S drops customerPrice AND salePrice to the sale price — the regular price is piecePrice. Regular cost now reads piecePrice; a SKU is on sale when salePrice is below piecePrice and saleExpiration hasn't passed. Verified against BX003: White $6.95 (was $8.95), other colors $8.95.
